diagnosis_steps: Force restart: hold Side + Volume Down for 10 seconds
Connect to power and wait 5 minutes
If screen flickers, likely display connector issue
Check for physical damage around screen edges
escalation: If force restart fails and device charges normally, escalate to display/logic board triage

diagnosis_steps: Check storage: Apple menu > About This Mac > Storage
Open Activity Monitor > check CPU and Memory tabs
Run First Aid in Disk Utility
Check login items: System Settings > General > Login Items
Run Apple Diagnostics: restart holding D
escalation: If Disk Utility reports errors that can't be repaired, escalate to drive replacement triage

diagnosis_steps: Toggle Airplane Mode on/off
Check carrier settings update: Settings > General > About
Remove and reseat SIM card
Reset network settings: Settings > General > Transfer or Reset > Reset Network Settings
Check if issue persists on another carrier SIM
escalation: If issue persists after network reset and SIM swap, escalate to modem triage

diagnosis_steps: Boot into Recovery Mode: hold Cmd+R on startup (Intel) or hold Power on Apple Silicon
Run First Aid on startup disk in Disk Utility
Check for macOS reinstall option
Reset NVRAM: restart holding Cmd+Option+P+R
Run Apple Diagnostics: restart holding D
escalation: If Recovery Mode is inaccessible or Disk Utility reports unrepairable errors, escalate to logic board/storage triage

diagnosis_steps: Toggle Bluetooth off/on on iPhone
Keep devices within 1 meter of each other
Restart both iPhone and Apple Watch
Check Watch app on iPhone for pending updates
Unpair and re-pair as last resort
escalation: If re-pairing fails, escalate to hardware triage — possible Bluetooth antenna issue

diagnosis_steps: Force restart: hold Top + Volume Up/Down
Remove screen protector if present
Dry device if moisture suspected
Test in a different app to isolate software vs hardware
Check for MDM restrictions if enterprise device
escalation: If touch fails after force restart and no screen protector, escalate to digitizer replacement triage

diagnosis_steps: Check profile status: System Settings > Privacy & Security > Profiles
Verify device is enrolled in Apple Business Manager
Check network connectivity to MDM server
Review MDM console for device-specific errors
Re-enroll device if profile shows error state
escalation: If re-enrollment fails, escalate to MDM admin team with device serial number and error logs

diagnosis_steps: Check battery health: Settings > Battery > Battery Health
Review battery usage by app: Settings > Battery
Disable background app refresh for heavy apps
Check location services: Settings > Privacy > Location Services
Update to latest iOS
escalation: If battery health below 80%, recommend battery replacement service
